label: Pharma/Life Sciences Compliance Add-on
description: Extra regulatory/compliance gap-scan layered on top of the qualification framework (MEDDPICC) for deals in regulated life-sciences/pharma accounts. Not part of MEDDPICC — a separate, complementary framework that only applies when the deal's industry warrants it.

dimensions.label: 21 CFR Part 11 / Electronic Records Compliance
dimensions.description: Whether the deal's evidence confirms the software's electronic-records/e-signature compliance (21 CFR Part 11) was actually validated with the account, not just claimed in a decision-criteria line.

dimensions.label: Data Residency / Regional Hosting (e.g. HDS/GDPR)
dimensions.description: Whether data-residency or health-data-hosting requirements (e.g. EU hosting, HDS certification) were captured and confirmed, given the account's region.

dimensions.label: Validation & Qualification Docs (IQ/OQ/PQ)
dimensions.description: Whether the account's validation/qualification documentation requirements for GxP systems were addressed before the deal stalled.

dimensions.label: IT/Security Review Formal Sign-off
dimensions.description: Whether a security or IT review that occurred actually resulted in a formal, documented sign-off — vs. an informal 'no concerns' that never became a closed approval.
